backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the ASTROMANIA backend, combining blob storage and authorization mixins to manage gemstones, reviews, cart, booking requests, contact submissions, social media links, and user profiles with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the Header component's logo background was changed from a mosaic/white style to a deep blue gradient, with high confidence and a single test requirement.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to short human-readable summaries describing each page or component's purpose and recent fixes applied.
frontend/index.css: Root Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors for background, foreground, primary, muted, sidebar, and chart tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'ASTROMANIA by Vijay Sawkar' and mounting the app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for all pages (Home, About, Services, GemstoneShop, BookConsultation, Testimonials, Contact), wraps the layout in a dark ThemeProvider, and renders a global Toaster.
frontend/src/components/FAQ.tsx: Accordion-based FAQ section component with five pre-defined questions and answers covering Kundali reading, Vastu correction, gemstone selection, gemstone effectiveness, and online consultations.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying the Astro-Vastu Knowledge logo, brand description, social media icons, quick navigation links, services list, and contact details with a dark cosmic color scheme.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with logo, desktop/mobile nav links, and an Internet Identity login/logout button that handles authentication state.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login/logout state and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for all backend operations including user profiles, gemstones, reviews, and cart management.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining a deep cosmic dark theme with CSS custom properties, Tailwind imports, Google Fonts, and custom animations like twinkle, float, and glow-pulse.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page showcasing Vijay Sawkar's biography, credentials, expertise areas, and statistics in a cosmic-themed layout.
frontend/src/pages/BookConsultation.tsx: A consultation booking page with a form for name, phone, email, date, consultation type, and message that submits via a mutation hook. Shows a success screen with a WhatsApp link after successful submission.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: A contact page with a message submission form and an admin-only media gallery supporting image/video upload and deletion via canister actor calls. Uses React Query for gallery state and upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/GemstoneShop.tsx: A gemstone shop page displaying a catalog of Vedic gemstones (Ruby, Pearl, Emerald, etc.) with details like planet association, price, benefits, and weight options, along with cart/inquiry UI components.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: The homepage featuring a hero section with animated stars, service cards, testimonials, and stats for an astrology/Vastu consultancy. Links to services and booking pages.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: A services overview page listing six Vedic service categories (Astrology, Vastu, Gemstone Therapy, Muhurta, Numerology, Kundali Matching) with descriptions and consultation mode options.
frontend/src/pages/Testimonials.tsx: Renders a testimonials page displaying 8 client reviews with star ratings, service tags, and styled cards on a dark cosmic background.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL parameters (supporting both query strings and hash-based routing), persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts (Cinzel, Cormorant Garamond), a cosmic color palette, box shadows, background images, and keyframe animations for the dark cosmic-themed app.
project_state.json: Tracks project state for the Astromania app, recording existing features and a pending request to change the Header logo background from a mosaic/white style to a bluish color.
